title: ImageFrame Client
description: Complementary client mod for servers with ImageFrame to display HD and full color images!
body:
## About This is the **complementary client mod** for players on servers using the plugin [**ImageFrame**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/imageframe)*! Having this mod enables you to see **image maps** in their **native resolution** and in **full colors**! _*Subject to the preconditions and requirements below._ ## Preconditions & Requirements ### For Players: - Main features work with static images only (not GIFs) - Support is subject to the version of ImageFrame installed on the server - Depends on whether the server disabled the client mod support feature - Some features only work with newly created images When in doubt, ask your server admins.

### For Server Admins: Currently, there are some limitations with the main features of the mod - Main features work with static images only (not GIFs) - Server must be running ImageFrame version 1.8.7.1 or above - Check that the feature is not disabled on the server - Full color works with existing images but native resolution only works with newly created images ## Features ### 1. Native Resolution and Full Color Just look at this comparison with and without the mod, no explaination needed. ![](https://resources.loohpjames.com/spigot/assets/imageframeclient/1.png)
_^With the mod_ ![](https://resources.loohpjames.com/spigot/assets/imageframeclient/2.png)
_^Without the mod_ *** Also works for maps while holding in hand! ![](https://resources.loohpjames.com/spigot/assets/imageframeclient/3.png)
*** ### 2. Tooltip Preview Preview maps and combined images in tooltips! ![](https://resources.loohpjames.com/spigot/assets/imageframeclient/4.png)
_^Tooltip for filled maps (Also works for vanilla maps)_ ![](https://resources.loohpjames.com/spigot/assets/imageframeclient/5.png)
_^Tooltip for combined images (The piece of enchanted paper you get)_ *** ### 3. Customization The above features can be enabled or disabled via [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu). *** ## Showcase Server Want a server to try this mod in? ``` IP: mc.loohpjames.com ``` ![](https://api.loohpjames.com/serverbanner.png?ip=mc.loohpjames.com&width=918&name=IP:%20mc.loohpjames.com) ## Contribution If other developers are interested in using this mod on other Minecraft versions or mod loaders, you are welcome to help port this. Would really appreciate it!
